description.value:
Goldleaf benedictions from open-sky chapels — Ljósamál open-sky chapels are built without roofs deliberately, letting language and light mingle freely; their benedictions, pressed into goldleaf and bound to an implement, pass that openness on through touch.

Effect: Once per respite, a creature you touch can either stand up if prone, or end one ongoing effect that would normally end with a saving throw or at the end of their turn (your choice of which).

Rules: Prone; Saving Throw; Respite.

project.prerequisites: An implement of exceptional quality; a goldleaf benediction sheet blessed under open sky at a Ljósamál chapel
